strengths: 20+ years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source geo-data platform actively used by NGOs such as Green Map
Recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
concerns: AI expertise is critically shallow — limited to roughly one year of tooling work at current role; no ML/AI products built at scale, no research background, and no advanced degree in any AI-related field
No evidence of director-level IC scope: no strategic customer advising, no cross-organizational influence, and no recognized external thought leadership in AI or cloud platforms
Cloud experience is surface-level — AWS CDK within a pricing team at Optilyz and Kubernetes self-hosting for a side project do not approach the cloud platform depth this role demands
response.justification: The role's core competencies are demonstrable AI expertise, cloud platform mastery, and director-level strategic influence — advising customers, shaping product direction, and inspiring internal and external audiences. Against these competencies the candidate falls short on every primary criterion. AI involvement is confined to roughly one year of MCP tooling work at re:cinq, with no ML research, no AI products shipped at meaningful scale, and no advanced degree. Cloud depth amounts to AWS CDK usage within a pricing team and Kubernetes self-hosting for an open-source side project — far below what an AI Strategy principal role demands. There is no evidence of strategic customer advising, executive-level communication, or recognized external thought leadership in AI. The 20-year career span and GISCollective founder role demonstrate real initiative and breadth, but breadth at a Staff/Senior developer level does not satisfy a Director-level IC mandate that requires established AI strategy credibility and demonstrated influence at scale.
